content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit is imported (`WallpaperGridView.swift:2`) and `HMHomeManager()` instantiated (`WallpaperGridView.swift:5`), but the app is a wallpaper browser with no home-automation UI (categories list only) and no HomeKit mention in the description.
Pierre: Apple scrutinizes HomeKit usage under 4.5.3 because the framework grants access to sensitive home-accessory data and must serve a genuine home-automation feature. Here `HMHomeManager` is created in a wallpaper grid with zero home-related functionality, which may trigger review questions about why the entitlement is needed. Remove the unused HomeKit import and manager, or add real home-automation features and a matching purpose string.
